title: Delicate Spanish Vegetable Pisto Manchego
description: A garlicky and fluffy Spanish dish featuring natural yoghurt and deep-fried vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This low-carb-friendly recipe is a twist on the traditional pisto manchego.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Fry the zucchini, eggplant, and red bell pepper slices in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per batch.
Remove the fried vegetables from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
In a large bowl, whisk together the natural yoghurt, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the fried vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat with the yoghurt mixture.
Serve the pisto manchego hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat the pisto manchego in the microwave or oven until warmed through.
